Metadata.title: Wosool — Run your Salla store from WhatsApp
Metadata.description: Wosool is an AI manager for your Salla store. It answers customers, executes commands, and reports back — all from WhatsApp. Start your 7-day free trial.

Hero.subtitle_line1: An AI manager that answers your customers,
Hero.subtitle_line2: runs your operations, and reports back —
Hero.subtitle_line3: all from a single WhatsApp chat.

SocialProofBar.items: Instant reply to every customer · Built on your real store data · Native Arabic · Direct Salla integration · Live in 2 minutes · Morning brief before your coffee

ProductCards.card1_title: Start your morning to a store that already worked all night.
ProductCards.card1_subtitle: Messages answered, orders confirmed, stock watched — all in one brief.
ProductCards.card1_item2: 3 orders confirmed and moving to shipping
ProductCards.card1_item3: 1 case waiting for your call — Wosool didn't decide alone
ProductCards.card2_title: One message. Your entire store, in motion.
ProductCards.card2_subtitle: Type what you need in plain Arabic — it understands, confirms, and acts in your Salla store.
ProductCards.step2_sub: Gets your intent — without literal instructions
ProductCards.example_input: Drop the camera price by 20 SAR

FeaturesGrid.heading: Intelligence that knows your store — and acts for you.
FeaturesGrid.card1_title: Knows your customers — even when you don't
FeaturesGrid.card1_description: Returning customers get a personal welcome — no "How can I help you?" every time.
FeaturesGrid.card2_description: Refunds, post-ship cancellations, big credits, escalations — all wait for you. Routine flows; decisions stay yours.
FeaturesGrid.card3_title: Answers from your store — not the internet
FeaturesGrid.card3_description: Real prices, live stock, your shipping policy. Your customer gets the truth — no follow-up apologies.

ComparisonGrid.heading: More than a reply. A store that runs.
ComparisonGrid.sub: WhatsApp sends. ChatGPT writes. Wosool replies, knows your store, and acts — in the same chat.
ComparisonGrid.summary_gpt: ChatGPT — helps you write and think.

Agents.sub: From customer service to sales and analytics — fully managed from WhatsApp.
Agents.agent1_tagline: Answers your customers clearly — at any hour.
Agents.agent2_tagline: Updates prices, products, and orders inside your store.
Agents.agent3_tagline: Sends daily briefs — sales, stock, what needs you.
Agents.agent4_tagline: Engages site visitors with confidence and guides them to buy.
Agents.agent4_message: What's the price of the first product?

KpiTrust.kpi4_label: Reliable when you need it most

Integrations.heading: Knows your store from minute one
Integrations.sub_line1: One connection, and it learns your store for you.
Integrations.sub_line2: Your products, orders, and customers — all at Wosool's fingertips.
Integrations.i2_note: Knows your store, runs it with you
Integrations.i3_note: Same power, for Zid stores — soon
Integrations.i5_note: Instagram and Facebook customers in one place — soon

CaseStudy.heading_line2: The numbers an owner actually cares about.
CaseStudy.quote: We were losing orders after hours because no one replied. From the first week with Wosool, every message got an answer — and our orders climbed 40% that same month.

DailyWork.tagline: Wosool takes it off your plate — and finishes it.
DailyWork.t2_text: I need to change my shipping address before it ships.
DailyWork.t3_text: The size doesn't fit. How do I exchange it?
DailyWork.t3_response: Sent you the exchange link — quick and easy
DailyWork.t4_text: How many late orders need follow-up today?
DailyWork.t5_text: Send me tonight's report on WhatsApp by 8 AM.
DailyWork.t5_response: Set — you'll get it at 7:55 daily
DailyWork.t6_text: Review inventory. Reply to reviews. Confirm pending orders.

SocialProof.g1_text: Used only to serve your store — improve replies and follow up with customers.
SocialProof.g2_text: Refunds, cancellations, big credits — none happen until you say yes.
SocialProof.g3_text: Export or delete it — whenever you want.
SocialProof.g4_text: Designed for the Saudi customer — from day one.

RoiCalc.heading: How much will Wosool save your store every month?
RoiCalc.sub: Move the slider to your daily message volume — see the hours and money that come back to you.
RoiCalc.footnote: Based on 90 sec per support message and a 5,000 SAR/mo full-time salary.
RoiCalc.result_eyebrow: Back in your store every month
RoiCalc.equivalent_text: A part-time hire's salary — plus the hours your store deserves.

Testimonials.heading: Merchants running with Wosool.
Testimonials.t1_quote: I used to start every morning reviewing orders by hand. Now a brief lands in WhatsApp every morning.
Testimonials.t2_quote: I added 30 products in 10 minutes — by voice, on the go.
Testimonials.t3_quote: My customer got a reply with the same care, any hour — as if I wrote it myself.

Pricing.heading: Plans built for every stage of your store's growth
Pricing.sub: Three plans. 7 days free on each.
Pricing.starter_desc: Start selling without losing a single customer.
Pricing.pro_desc: Run your whole store from WhatsApp.
Pricing.pro_f2_head: 21 automations covering the full customer journey
Pricing.pro_f3: Recover up to 500 abandoned carts / month
Pricing.pro_f4: Full store control from one message
Pricing.footer_note: Every plan starts with a 7-day free trial — cancel or upgrade anytime.
Pricing.compare_right: Wosool: from 499 SAR/mo — runs your whole store

Security.heading: Your store data, fully under your control
Security.body: We don't sell your store data, and we don't use it to train public models. Wosool works on your data — to serve your customers and do what you ask. That's it.

FAQ.heading: Frequently asked
FAQ.q1: Do I need to be technical?
FAQ.a1: No. If you can use WhatsApp, you can run Wosool.
FAQ.q2: What if a customer wants to talk to a human?
FAQ.a2: Wosool detects it automatically and hands off to you so you can pick up the conversation.
FAQ.q3: What if it gets a reply wrong?
FAQ.a3: Wosool checks with you before any sensitive action. It never operates outside its permissions.
FAQ.q4: Can I try it before I subscribe?
FAQ.a4: Yes — 7 days free, full access to every feature.
FAQ.q5: How is this different from hiring a support rep?
FAQ.a5: Wosool replies to every customer in seconds, any time, and never forgets an order — at a fraction of one rep's cost.
FAQ.a6: Your data is yours. We don't sell it or share it, and you can delete it anytime.

ActivationJourney.steps_heading: From signup to live — under two minutes
ActivationJourney.step1_text: Your email and store name. That's it.
ActivationJourney.step3_title: Your store starts replying and selling
ActivationJourney.step3_text: Wosool handles its first customer before you finish your coffee.
ActivationJourney.first_message_l3: Everything's ready. Just tell me what you need.
ActivationJourney.heading: The difference from hour one
ActivationJourney.after_msg2: A brief, confirmed orders, deals closed
